question: How many trailing zeros does 87! have when written in base 12?
How many trailing zeros does 60! have when written in base 15?
What are the last two digits of 3^123? Give the two-digit number.
What are the last two digits of 7^222? Give the two-digit number.
March 15, 2021 was a Monday. What day of the week is exactly 1000 days after March 15, 2021?
January 1, 2026 is a Thursday. What day of the week was exactly 777 days before January 1, 2026?
On a grid, you walk from (0,0) to (6,5) moving only right or up, one unit per step. How many such paths do NOT pass through the point (3,2)?
Seven letters are placed randomly into seven addressed envelopes, one letter per envelope. In how many arrangements does EXACTLY two letters end up in their correct envelopes?
How many integers from 1 to 1000 inclusive are divisible by 3 or 5, but NOT divisible by 7?
Three fair six-sided dice are rolled. What is the probability that the sum is exactly 10? Answer as a reduced fraction.
Two fair six-sided dice are rolled. What is the probability that the sum is a prime number? Answer as a reduced fraction.
What is the sum of the decimal digits of 2^40?
What is the angle in degrees between the hour and minute hands of a clock at 7:38? Give the smaller angle as a whole number.
What is the angle in degrees between the hour and minute hands of a clock at 4:52? Give the smaller angle as a whole number.
Consider all numbers that have exactly three digits when written in base 9 and are palindromes in base 9. How many of them are divisible by 4 (in ordinary decimal terms)?
Let F(1)=1, F(2)=1, F(n)=F(n-1)+F(n-2). What is the remainder when F(30) is divided by 9?
How many integers between 100 and 999 inclusive have strictly increasing digits (each digit larger than the one before)?
Six people check their hats. In how many ways can the hats be returned so that NO person receives their own hat?
What is the smallest positive integer n such that n! ends in at least 30 zeros (in ordinary base 10)?
From 10 people, a committee of 4 is chosen. Two particular people, A and B, refuse to serve together. How many committees are possible?
